description_long: This is a large, commercial-style coffee machine with a robust rectangular body and a matte black finish. The front features a prominent control panel with multiple square buttons, a central digital display, and two symmetrical knobs on either side. Below the control panel is a spacious drip tray with a ridged surface and a single portafilter handle extending outward, as well as a steam wand for frothing milk. The top of the machine is flat and bordered by a metal rail, likely for cup storage or warming. The sides are solid and unadorned, while the back is plain with a subtle seam and the rail visible. The overall design is utilitarian and built for high-traffic environments such as cafes or urban kiosks.
description: A large, matte black commercial coffee machine with a button-filled control panel, digital display, portafilter, and steam wand. It features a flat top with a metal rail and a spacious drip tray.
description_view_0: Side view showing the solid matte black body, the portafilter handle, and part of the drip tray.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the control panel with multiple buttons, digital display, two knobs, the portafilter, steam wand, and the full drip tray.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the portafilter handle and drip tray from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the plain back panel and the metal rail on top, with no controls or interactive features visible.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel features two rows of square buttons symmetrically arranged on either side of a central digital display, with a round knob at each end.
